–1. Also called ABEL-SHITTIMNu 33:49
  .A camping place of IsraelNu 25:1;33:49
  .Joshua sends spies fromJos 2:1
  .The valley ofJoe 3:18
  .Balaam prophesies inMic 6:5
–2. Also called SHITTAH, a tree, the wood of which is fragrant
  .Planted and cultivatedIsa 41:19
  .The ark of the covenant made ofEx 25:10
  .The staves (long poles) of the ark of the covenant made ofEx 25:13;38:6
  .The boards in the tabernacle made ofEx 26:15-37
  .The altar of burnt offering made ofEx 38:1,6
